title: angelica ampla
intro: Angelica ampla, also known as Peruvian angelica or giant angelica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Angelica ampla can be prepared into teas, tinctures, infusions, and capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
